tests.name: getPanelDataSummary > deprecated backward-compatible properties > should be consistent with the generic field type methods
getPanelDataSummary > deprecated backward-compatible properties > should return zero/false for deprecated fields when no data is provided
getPanelDataSummary > when a frame has preferredVisualisationType in metadata > should capture the preferred visualisation type
getPanelDataSummary > when called with a single dataframes > should return correct summary
getPanelDataSummary > when called with an explicit empty array > should return the same result as calling with no arguments
getPanelDataSummary > when called with multiple dataframes > should return correct summary
getPanelDataSummary > when called with no dataframes > should return summary with zero counts
getPanelDataSummary > when called with undefined input > should handle undefined gracefully like an empty array
getPanelDataSummary > when preferredVisualisationType is not set > should leave preferredVisualisationType undefined
